offer: For law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient documentation generation causes compliance risks. We automate compliance documentation instead of manual documentation processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
Direct message 20-50 law firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for law firms sharing resources
try_it: Let users try template library and document editor on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
